description: Send notifications to your own Free-Mobile destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise freemobile:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus channels transform the envelope directly into a Free-Mobile SMS API JSON body and post it to smsapi.free-mobile.fr (no Apprise).
name: msg-to-freemobile

request.template: {"urls":"freemobile://${ customer_secrets.FREEMOBILE_USER }@${ customer_secrets.FREEMOBILE_PASSWORD }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"urls":"freemobile://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.user_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.password_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"user":"${ customer_secrets.FREEMOBILE_USER }","pass":"${ customer_secrets.FREEMOBILE_PASSWORD }","msg":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="" and ": " or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}

{"user":"${ customer_secrets.FREEMOBILE_USER }","pass":"${ customer_secrets.FREEMOBILE_PASSWORD }","msg":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="" and ": " or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}
